original_statement: adam shunk received the same score as what other competitor?
mutated_statement: a contestant received the same score as what other competitor who is also required to have a unique score?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + definiteness change + constraint insertion: specific proper name replaced by a generic indefinite NP (adam shunk → a contestant) | added relative clause imposing a uniqueness requirement on the compared competitor (…what other competitor? → …what other competitor who is also required to have a unique score?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought（“Prediction Answer is missing/blank”）和tree_and_critic的树状错误报告（“sub-table error -> function error -> invalid function usage -> column selection misuse”）可识别关键信息。Agent在执行日志中仅按流程调用了group/select/sort/simple_query等操作且未产生实质回答，且critique为空，未提出澄清或修正。具体表现为形式化、机械地执行查询函数并产生函数使用错误或空结果，而没有识别或解释变异问题中的语义矛盾（名字泛化与要求唯一性的冲突），也未向用户询问更多信息。因此应归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”：代理未表现出对矛盾的认知或主动修正，而是被动/机械地尝试执行导致失败。
